[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101111100 6
1 000110111 5
2 010010001 3
3 100001000 2
4 010110110 5

6 101010110 5
7 111111111 a
